5,0,0.nbt: {components:{"minecraft:custom_data":{dt_loot_prefab_id:"pot"}},item:{components:{"minecraft:custom_data":{dt_random_book:"deathnote",dt_random_book_variant:0},"minecraft:written_book_content":{author:"Anonymous",pages:[{raw:'"Elias Renn."'},{raw:'"A man three carriages back swore this works, so I\'m writing the name above before I lose my nerve."'},{raw:'"You take a book and quill. On the first page, the name. Only the name — nothing else, he said, or it won\'t take. Then you sign it. That\'s the part that matters. The signing."'},{raw:'"After that you just have to die. Somewhere ahead of them, out on the tracks, your echo climbs up and goes looking for the name you wrote.\\n\\nI\'ve written it. My hand won\'t sign yet. What if nothing happens? What if something does?"'}],resolved:1b,title:{raw:"Deathnote"}}},count:1,id:"minecraft:written_book"}}
